title: Determinism audit
purpose: Run a configured verification command twice, compare exit status, stdout/stderr digests, parsed JSON canonical digests when present, stable source artifact hashes, and generated verdict artifact hashes.

ciMode.rationale: CI uses a fast deterministic JSON-producing checker to verify the determinism harness itself without recursively running the full verifier twice inside every determinism workflow run. Independent reviewers can omit --command to run the stronger default pnp-verify-all determinism probe.

nonClaims: This determinism audit does not activate public theorem emission.
This determinism audit does not clear Release.UnrestrictedFinalSoundness or ExternalReview.Acceptance.
The CI smoke command proves the determinism harness on a fast checker and does not by itself prove full-repository bit-for-bit determinism.
The default command is a stronger verifier replay, but the manifest does not yet claim every possible platform and environment produces identical bytes.
